text:
Medicaid Coverage Start Date - First occurrence since 1999 of Medicaid coverage, regardless of state (source: Uniform eligibility code from MAX) date - MM/DD/YYYY
 D_STATE_CD_1 -12 Monthly State Code: January through December (state of residence) 2-letter postal abbreviation
 D_ZIP Five-digit ZIP Code of Beneficiary/Enrollee XXXXX
 D_COUNTY Annual county for the individual. XXX
Long Term Services L_MEDICAID_LTSS_DTL_1 - 12 Monthly detail of Medicaid long term supports and services(LTSS) status.
